notes: Captured through local Playwright + system Chrome.
Credentials were provided through environment variables and are not stored in this artifact.

pages.bodyTextSample: PTS-2 controller ver. 2026.06.24 17:06:33 root Actions Configuration / General settings Settings Pumps Probes Grades Payments Tanks Nozzles Boards Readers Parameters Wireless Server Users DATE/TIME System date/time Sets system date/time in format dd.MM.yy hh:mm:ss Auto sync Automatic synchronization with time server UTC offset + - 0 h 1 h 2 h 3 h 4 h 5 h 6 h 7 h 8 h 9 h 10 h 11 h 12 h 13 h 14 h 15 h 16 h 17 h 18 h 19 h 20 h 21 h 22 h 23 h 0 min 1 min 2 min 3 min 4 min 5 min 6 min 7 min 8 min 9 min 10 min 11 min 12 min 13 min 14 min 15 min 16 min 17 min 18 min 19 min 20 min 21 min 22 min 23 min 24 min 25 min 26 min 27 min 28 min 29 min 30 min 31 min 32 min 33 min 34 min 35 min 36 min 37 min 38 min 39 min 40 min 41 min 42 min 43 min 44 min 45 min 46 min 47 min 48 min 49 min 50 min 51 min 52 min 53 min 54 min 55 min 56 min 57 min 58 min 59 min Get Set NETWORK SETTINGS IP-address Sets IP-address in IPv4 in format xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx Network mask Sets network mask in format xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx Gateway Sets gateway in format xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx Port for HTTP Sets port for HTTP protocol (range from 1 to 65535) Port for HTTPS Sets port for HTTPS protocol (range from 1 to 65535) DNS server 1 Sets DNS (domain network system) server 1 in format xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx DNS server 2 Server SSL certificate Allows to upload own server SSL certificate in the .pem format No certificate file found Select file Private key for server SSL certificate Allows to upload own private key for server SSL certificate in the .pem format No private key file found Select file Used protocol type HTTP Used authentication type Basic Used MAC address [masked] Get Set WORKING SHIFTS Sets account of working shifts Sets account of working shifts in the controller. When this parameter is set then it is not possible to make sales
